creator: meka@tilda.center
text: As I don't have the time to fix all the ports, may I suggest alternative solution? If I go through the list of ports that use pytest using pytest-check.sh and replace pytest with pytest4 that way nobody has to break as that is exact version like pytest in main branch, yet nobody has to wait as new ports will probably use newer pytest. I need a feedback on this before I continue, so please advise.
